answered.description: true if the system gave an answer, false if it refused

relevance.description: does the answer address the question

faithfulness.description: every claim supported by the cited concept(s); 5 = fully grounded, 0 = fabricated

citation_accuracy.description: cited concept ids actually support the claims they back

correct_refusal.description: for OOD/unanswerable cases: true if the system correctly refused
